## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Platform:** (e.g., Windows 11, Android 14, macOS Sonoma, etc.)
- **Device:** (e.g., Pixel 7, Fire TV Stick 4K, MacBook Pro M2, etc.)
- **App Version:** (e.g., 0.1.0-alpha)
- **Build Type:** (APK, Windows EXE, Web, etc.)

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
